ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

Ivan Gold, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Union Street Enterprise, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Georgiou Properties.
Default was entered against defendant on jan. 7, 2011.
Doe defendants were dismissed on Jan 5, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Union Street Enterprise and against the Defaulted Defendant Georgiou Properties as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,000.00; prejudgmt int at 10% $18,384.40; Attorney's Fees - $1950.00; Costs - $410.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $120,744.40

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

William W. Huckins, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Union Street Enterprises, LLC, a California limited liability company.
